data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: See if you can solve mathematical equations on time

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_DELAY_DESC
data.value: How many milliseconds to wait before making the next write?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: See if you can press a key on time

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Minimum red colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Minimum green colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: Minimum blue colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Minimum colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255 for 255 colours or 16 for 16 colours.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Maximum red colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Maximum green colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: Maximum blue colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_SHOWINPUT_DESC
data.value: Whether to show what's written in the input prompt.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MININUM_DESC
data.value: What is the minimum number to choose?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MAXINUM_DESC
data.value: What is the maximum number to choose?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_TIMEOUT_DESC
data.value: How many milliseconds to wait for the keypress before the timeout? (In custom difficulty)

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_STAGEDELAY_DESC
data.value: How many milliseconds to wait before drawing the next stage?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_E_DESC
data.value: Starts the game in easy difficulty

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_M_DESC
data.value: Starts the game in medium difficulty

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_H_DESC
data.value: Starts the game in hard difficulty

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_V_DESC
data.value: Starts the game in very hard difficulty

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_C_DESC
data.value: Starts the game in custom difficulty. Please note that the custom timeout in milliseconds should be written as argument.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_QUOTE_TEXTLOCATION_DESC
data.value: Select your preferred progress text location.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_NEEDSNUM
data.value: You can only write the numbers.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METEOR_DESC
data.value: You are a spaceship and the meteors are coming to destroy you. Can you save it?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_USEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: Whether to use PowerLine to render the spaceship or to use the standard greater than character. If you want to use PowerLine with Meteor, you need to install an appropriate font with PowerLine support.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_METEORSPEED_DESC
data.value: Specifies the game speed in milliseconds.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_BACKRACE_DESC
data.value: Do you back the wrong horse?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_HARDCORE_DESC
data.value: One wrong letter and you're hung!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_PRACTICE_DESC
data.value: Test your Hangman skills by throwing a random letter.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METERORDODGE_DESC
data.value: You are a spaceship and the meteors are coming to destroy you. Can you dodge them?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SHIPDUET_DESC
data.value: Two spaceships are on a fight with each other. One shot and the spaceship will blow. This is a local two-player game.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_KEYBINDINGS
data.value: [ENTER] Start the race | [ESC] Exit | [UP/DOWN] Move selection

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_WORDLE_WIN
data.value: You guessed the right word! You win!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DIFFICULTY_DESC
data.value: Select your preferred difficulty, where 0 is easy, 1 is medium, 2 is hard, 3 is very hard, and 4 is custom.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_SHIPDUETUSEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: Whether to use PowerLine to render the spaceship or to use the standard greater than character. If you want to use PowerLine with ShipDuet, you need to install an appropriate font with PowerLine support.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_COLOR_DESC
data.value: This allows you to configure the colours

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: This section lets you configure Solver.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: This section lets you configure SpeedPress.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_DESC
data.value: This section lets you configure Meteor and ShipDuet.

data.name: NKS_SCREENSAVERPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_MAXCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Maximum colour level. The minimum accepted value is 0 and the maximum accepted value is 255 for 255 colours or 16 for 16 colours.
